steps.title: Spot the geographical signal
steps.content: The passage explicitly describes the discovery as expanding our understanding of the geographical distribution of mixopterids. This phrase is the key signal: the find's significance lies in geographical scope.

steps.title: Apply the geographical signal to the choices
steps.content: A mixopterid fossil from Gondwana provides the first evidence of mixopterids outside Laurussia. The other three options focus on timing, relationships to modern animals, or evolution, none of which the passage emphasizes. That matches choice D — D is correct.
